styles.name: 2D动漫风格
styles.prompt: anime style, 2D animation, cel shading, vibrant colors, clean line art
styles.description: 经典日式/国创2D动画风格

styles.name: 真人写实
styles.prompt: photorealistic, cinematic lighting, high detail, realistic textures, natural colors
styles.description: 接近真人照片的写实风格

styles.name: 3D国创
styles.prompt: 3D Chinese animation style, smooth shading, stylized proportions, vibrant lighting
styles.description: 国产3D动画风格（如斗罗大陆、完美世界）

styles.name: 三渲二
styles.prompt: 3D toon shading, anime-like 3D, cel-shaded 3D, bold outlines, flat colors with shading

styles.name: 吉卜力
styles.prompt: Studio Ghibli style, Hayao Miyazaki aesthetic, hand-painted backgrounds, soft lighting, whimsical
styles.description: 宫崎骏/吉卜力工作室风格

styles.name: 龙族传说
styles.prompt: Dragon-themed fantasy style, epic scale, mythical creatures, dramatic lighting

styles.name: 浮世绘
styles.prompt: Ukiyo-e style, Japanese woodblock print, bold outlines, flat color areas, traditional patterns

styles.name: 油画釉光
styles.prompt: oil painting style, impasto texture, rich colors, glazed finish, classical art

styles.name: 水彩
styles.prompt: watercolor painting, soft edges, translucent layers, flowing colors, paper texture

styles.name: 哥特
styles.prompt: gothic art style, dark atmosphere, ornate details, dramatic shadows, Victorian elements

styles.name: 波普
styles.prompt: pop art style, bold colors, Ben-Day dots, comic-inspired, high contrast

styles.name: Q萌马克笔
styles.prompt: chibi style, cute proportions, big head small body, marker coloring, bright cheerful colors
styles.description: Q版大头小身，马克笔质感

styles.name: 火柴人
styles.prompt: stick figure style, minimalist, simple lines, expressive poses

styles.name: 像素
styles.prompt: pixel art style, retro game aesthetic, limited palette, blocky forms, 16-bit

styles.name: 美式3D
styles.prompt: American 3D animation style, Pixar-like, expressive characters, soft lighting, subsurface scattering

styles.name: 乐高
styles.prompt: LEGO style, blocky construction toy aesthetic, plastic textures, stud details

styles.name: 折纸艺术
styles.prompt: origami art style, paper folding aesthetic, geometric forms, paper texture, soft shadows

styles.name: 日式少女漫
styles.prompt: shoujo manga style, sparkling eyes, flowing hair, delicate line work, pastel colors, romantic atmosphere
styles.description: 少女漫画风格，唯美浪漫

styles.name: 东方古典
styles.prompt: traditional East Asian painting style, ink wash, calligraphic lines, misty atmosphere, classical composition

styles.name: 复古赛璐璐
styles.prompt: retro cel animation style, 1980s anime aesthetic, film grain, vibrant colors, classic shading
